mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_risk_assessment_detail_form ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_risk_assessment_detail_form WHERE risk_id = #{riskId} ORDER BY sort_no ASC
SELECT * FROM tb_risk_assessment_detail_form WHERE risk_id = #{riskId} ORDER BY sort_no ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_risk_assessment_detail_form (risk_id, basic_id, risk_idx, major_category, detail_action, risk_4m, danger, expected_disaster, target, curr_safety_measures, possibility, result, risk_score, risk_grade, regist_status, manage_plan, manage_possibility, manage_result, manage_risk_score, manage_risk_grade, sort_no, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{riskId}, #{basicId}, #{riskIdx}, #{majorCategory}, #{detailAction}, #{risk4m}, #{danger}, #{expectedDisaster}, #{target}, #{currSafetyMeasures}, #{possibility}, #{result}, #{riskScore}, #{riskGrade}, #{registStatus}, #{managePlan}, #{managePossibility}, #{manageResult}, #{manageRiskScore}, #{manageRiskGrade}, #{sortNo}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_risk_assessment_detail_form SET basic_id = #{basicId}, risk_idx = #{riskIdx}, major_category = #{majorCategory}, detail_action = #{detailAction}, risk_4m = #{risk4m}, danger = #{danger}, expected_disaster = #{expectedDisaster}, target = #{target}, curr_safety_measures = #{currSafetyMeasures}, possibility = #{possibility}, result = #{result}, risk_score = #{riskScore}, risk_grade = #{riskGrade}, regist_status = #{registStatus}, manage_plan = #{managePlan}, manage_possibility = #{managePossibility}, manage_result = #{manageResult}, manage_risk_score = #{manageRiskScore}, manage_risk_grade = #{manageRiskGrade}, sort_no = #{sortNo}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
